_comment: Config MCP local do MECHA. Fonte unica de conexao Neo4j via neo4j-mecha (stdio, read-only). Aponte seu Antigravity/Claude para este arquivo (Settings > MCP) ou copie a entrada 'neo4j-mecha' para o config global do app e reinicie.

neo4j-mecha.description: Grafo MECHA (Digital Twin): ontologia v2.1.0 + second_brain. Tools: neo4j_status, cypher_read (read-only guard), ontology_domains, ontology_layers, find_component, neighbors.

sendspeed-mecha.description: Cerebro de dominio SendSpeed (debate O6): conhecimento do linear-export (317 issues SEND) + journeys multi-agent. Read-only, stdio. Tools: sendspeed_status, sendspeed_module_map, sendspeed_find_issue, sendspeed_search, sendspeed_gaps, crm_postback_contract, crm_status_depara, callback_pipeline_map, journey_engine_map, journey_trigger_contract, journey_objective_attribution, journey_catalog, channel_send_spec, otp_flow_spec, igaming_webhook_pattern, webhook_security_spec, crm_adapter_registry.

mecha-core.description: MECHA Core Orchestrator (FastMCP, stdio): squads em DAG, RAG Qdrant, AgentBus e bridge Claw. Tools: get_qdrant_status, search_rag, index_engram, run_squad_workflow, bus_list_agents, bus_send_message, bus_get_inbox, bus_compliance_report, bus_stats, claw_evaluate_action, get_conversation, search_conversations.
